items.title: Canada’s Marcelo Flores Ruled Out Of World Cup With ACL Injury
items.summary: Canadian winger Marcelo Flores will miss this summer's World Cup after suffering a torn ACL during the Concacaf Champions final against Tigres.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Uncapped Yengi and Volpato in Australia World Cup squad
items.summary: Livingston striker Tete Yengi and former Italy Under-21 winger Cristian Volpato are the uncapped players named in Australia's 26-man squad for the World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: No previous French Open champions left - who will seize chance?
items.summary: With Iga Swiatek's early French Open exit meaning new men's and women's champions will be crowned, BBC Sport analyses how the draws have been blown open.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
